purpose: Record public run reports from people who cloned the source/checker repository, ran the verifier, and submitted reproducible evidence.
nonClaims: A run record means someone reports running the verifier and reproducing the stated machine result.
A run record is not automatically a mathematical endorsement, theorem activation, or release-blocker clearance.
This registry does not activate public theorem emission or clear Release.UnrestrictedFinalSoundness or ExternalReview.Acceptance.
